creator: nistor@snickers.org
text:
Wesley,

After looking at the patch I totally approve it.  Although I'm at a loss 
where you find the rrdtool stuff fits in ...


Cheers,

On Wed, 30 Apr 2008, Wesley Shields wrote:

> Can you please test this patch to make sure it properly picks up libdbi
> now.  My testing shows it does, but I'd prefer some run-time testing if
> possible.
>
> Jon, do you approve of this patch?  While I'm at it, the port does
> support rrdtool (suggested).  Do you want to enable this dependency, or
> save it for later?
>
> -- WXS
>

  ________
   Jon (nistor@snickers.org) - iiooiioo.ooooioii.ooiiooio.iooioiio
